name: vercel-ai-commit-inspector
title: Commit Inspector
author: Vercel
description: A collapsible commit inspector with metadata, copy action, and per-file changes.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Added reduced-motion handling and logical spacing for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
